symptoms.symptom_name: Fever >=5 days, unrelenting and unresponsive to antipyretics

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fever >=5 days is the cardinal, near-obligatory criterion of Kawasaki disease.
Most viral exanthems defervesce within 3-5 days; unrelenting fever beyond 5 days is atypical.
Bilateral limbal-sparing non-purulent conjunctivitis is a principal Kawasaki feature.
Scarlet fever does not cause non-exudative conjunctivitis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Erythematous cracked bleeding lips with strawberry tongue

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Oral mucosal change (cracked lips, strawberry tongue) is a principal Kawasaki feature.
Strawberry tongue also occurs in scarlet fever, so it is not discriminating on its own.
A polymorphous non-vesicular rash is a principal Kawasaki feature but is non-specific in isolation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Erythema and indurative oedema of hands and feet, refusing to walk

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Erythema and indurative oedema of the extremities in the acute phase is a principal Kawasaki feature.
Extremity oedema is not a feature of scarlet fever.
Cervical lymphadenopathy >=1.5 cm (often unilateral) is a principal Kawasaki feature, though the least frequent.

symptoms.symptom_name: New soft systolic murmur with tachycardia out of proportion to fever

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A new murmur with disproportionate tachycardia suggests myocarditis/valvulitis — a sealed clinician auscultation finding not obtainable in telehealth.
Cardiac inflammation is the dangerous complication that drives the emergency tier.

symptoms.symptom_name: Sudden chest-pain / chest-clutching episode in a young child

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acute chest pain in a young child is abnormal and, with the cardiac signs, raises myocardial involvement/ischaemia.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fully vaccinated / immunisations up to date

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Full MMR vaccination markedly reduces the likelihood of measles.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absence of cough, coryza and Koplik spots

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The 3 C's (cough, coryza, conjunctivitis) plus Koplik spots are needed for measles; their absence argues against it.

symptoms.symptom_name: Clinician-measured vitals: BP 90/60, HR 145, Temp 39.4 C, RR 28, SpO2 98%

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tachycardia out of proportion to fever supports cardiac inflammation — a sealed clinician measurement; the AI Doctor infers seriousness from the reported story, not measured vitals.

symptoms.symptom_name: Coronary artery aneurysm / ventricular dysfunction on echocardiography

investigation_details.expected_result: Assess coronary artery calibre/aneurysms and ventricular function; may be normal early
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Coronary involvement is missed and untreated aneurysms risk thrombosis and infarction.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Coronary artery aneurysms on echo are the defining cardiac complication of Kawasaki disease — hospital investigation, never available in telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Inflammatory markers and blood tests (raised CRP/ESR, thrombocytosis, raised WCC, low albumin, raised ALT)

investigation_details.expected_result: Marked systemic inflammation supporting Kawasaki disease
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Supportive laboratory evidence and severity markers are missed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Elevated inflammatory markers and thrombocytosis support the diagnosis and inform IVIG-resistance risk — hospital bloods, not telehealth.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Complete Kawasaki mucocutaneous constellation with prolonged fever
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Fever >=5 days plus all five principal features fulfils the complete clinical criteria for Kawasaki disease.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Kawasaki disease with cardiac involvement / myocarditis
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: A sudden chest episode, disproportionate tachycardia and a new murmur convert this from urgent to time-critical.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Assess for coronary artery aneurysms and ventricular dysfunction — the defining cardiac complication; arranged in hospital, not orderable via telehealth.
Evaluate for myocardial ischaemia/myocarditis given the acute chest episode and new murmur.
Confirm systemic inflammation, thrombocytosis and severity markers to support Kawasaki disease and guide treatment.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Throat swab / rapid strep test as an isolated home step to send the child home
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Chasing scarlet fever with a swab and treating at home must NOT delay emergency escalation; it is at most an inpatient adjunct.
